# v19.3 Field House Redesign

- Rebuilt Field House as a readable FireRed-style hub with clear lanes and obvious landmarks.
- Simplified collision to match visible walls and major furniture only.
- Moved NPCs to logical, reachable positions.
- Kept recovery, sparring mat, coach, shop/gear, exits, objectives, practice, battles, recruiting, scouting, saves, and deployment structure intact.
